topic.description: Source MQTT topic or logical event source, for example ems/safety.

type.description: Logical event type: safety, wallbox, boiler, battery_grid, plan, appliance.

key.description: Stable deduplication key for anti-spam logic.

notify.description: Whether this event should be considered for mobile notification.

speak.description: Whether this event may be spoken by a future voice layer.

human_hint.description: Short Czech explanation of what happened; source text for AI, not a command.

recommendation_hint.description: Allowed Czech recommendation; AI must not recommend actions outside this hint.

allowed_topics.description: Topics the AI may mention for this event.

forbidden_topics.description: Topics the AI must not mention for this event.

silent.description: Whether the automatic commentator must ignore this event.
